sections.paragraph:
- Original: μᾶλλον

- Transliteration: Mallon

- Phonetic: mal'-lon

- Definition:

1. more, to a greater degree, rather

a. much, by far

b. rather, sooner

c. more willingly, more readily, sooner

- Origin: neuter of the comparative of the same as G3122

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Neuter of the comparative of the same as G3122; (adverb) more (in a greater degree) or rather: - + better X far (the) more (and more) (so) much (the more) rather.
